title: Cassette Music Disc
description: Turns all music discs into colorful 3D cassette tapes.
body:
🎵✨ Casset Music Disc — Bring Retro Vibes to Your Minecraft!

Give your music discs a complete visual makeover with Casset Music Disc, a texture pack that turns every disc into a stylish 3D cassette tape! 📼💛💜

With vibrant retro aesthetics and a unique nostalgic charm, each track now comes with its own colorful cassette, making your world feel more creative, fun, and visually expressive. Perfect for players who love adding personality and vintage flair to their gameplay!

⭐ Main Features:

📼 Replaces all music discs with detailed cassette tapes
🎶 More immersive jukebox experience
🌈 Multiple colors and styles, each matching a different disc
✨ Clean, nostalgic design that keeps Minecraft’s original vibe
🔧 Fully compatible with shaders and OptiFine

Bring the 80s straight into your adventures and enjoy your soundtrack with a whole new retro style! 😎🎧
